response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocal phonetics perfectly align with the '飛行艇' (Hikoutei) lyrics in the Reference JSON. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for lyrics transcription and translation; manual transcription was used for the introductory visual text and song credits. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were strictly anchored to vocal onset; aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions were applied during the rapid-fire choruses to maintain synchronization and prevent cascading delays. Visual triggers were used for the event title card and song credits.

subtitles.original: 音乃瀬奏 IN PROGRESS BIRTHDAY LIVE 2026
subtitles.english: [Title: Otonose Kanade IN PROGRESS BIRTHDAY LIVE 2026]

subtitles.original: 飛行艇 | 作詞・作曲：常田大希
どんな夢を見に行こうか
subtitles.english: What kind of dreams should we go see?

subtitles.original: 正しさばかりに恐れ戦かないで
subtitles.english: Don't be afraid and tremble only at correctness

subtitles.original: 自由自在に飛び回って
ステップ・バイ・ステップ
ビートを刻んで
果ての無いパーティーを続けようか
subtitles.english: Shall we continue the endless party?

subtitles.original: この時代に飛び乗って
今夜この街を飛び立って
subtitles.english: Tonight, fly away from this city

subtitles.original: 大空を飛び回って
命揺らせ 命揺らせ
subtitles.english: Shake your life, shake your life

subtitles.original: この風に飛び乗って
今夜台風の目となって
subtitles.english: Tonight, become the eye of the typhoon

subtitles.original: 大空を飛び回って
命揺らせ 命揺らせ
subtitles.english: Shake your life, shake your life

subtitles.original: 代わり映えしない日常の片隅で
subtitles.english: In the corner of this unchanging daily life

subtitles.original: 無邪気に笑っていられたらいいよな
subtitles.english: It would be nice to be able to laugh innocently

subtitles.original: 無意味な旅を続けたって
ワン・バイ・ワン
一歩ずつでいいさ
subtitles.english: One step at a time is fine

subtitles.original: 歓声も罵声も呑み込んで
この時代に飛び乗って
今夜愚かな杭となって
過ちを恐れないで
命揺らせ 命揺らせ
subtitles.english: Shake your life, shake your life

subtitles.original: この風に飛び乗って
今夜名も無き風となって
清濁を併せ呑んで
subtitles.english: Swallow both the pure and the impure
